# Pull Request

## Description
- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changes were made?

---

## Before You Start
- [ ] I discussed this change on Discord before implementation (if applicable)

---

## Checklist

### Scope
- [ ] This PR addresses **one single idea** (bug, feature, or refactor)
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included

### Commits
- [ ] Commits are logically separated
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] Commit history is clean (rebased/squashed if needed)

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows project style and conventions
- [ ] Changes are tested
- [ ] No unnecessary or leftover code

### Review Readiness
- [ ] PR is ready to merge (not a draft)
- [ ] All review comments are addressed
- [ ] Changes are applied to existing commits when appropriate

### Size & Clarity
- [ ] PR is reasonably small and easy to review
- [ ] Large changes are split into multiple PRs if needed

---

## Notes (optional)
- Additional context, screenshots, or details
